ham: Hey! Swiggy is giving you 20% OFF on all orders this weekend. Use code SWIGGY20 at checkout. Enjoy your meal! <URL>
spam: URGENT: Aapka Amazon parcel deliver ho gaya lekin aapne receive nahi kiya? Kindly verify your address or contact courier at <URL>. Agar 24 ghante tak response nahi milta, aapka account block ho sakta hai. Jaldi kare!
